title: no FSM in design, execute "synth" without "-nofsm", some logic is recognized as FSM and the number of register will become more

features.name: registered output updated via combinational function result
features.description: Code should include a registered output with async reset that is updated with the result of a combinational function, where the FSM extractor misidentifies this as a state machine
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) out_pre <= 3'b110; else if (|in) out_pre <= covert; end

features.name: function with integer for-loop and bit indexing returning combinational result
features.description: Code should include a function returning integer that uses a for-loop with integer iteration variable and bit indexing to compute a result, feeding registered logic that FSM extractor misidentifies
features.snippet: function integer onehot2bin(input integer onehot); integer i; onehot2bin = 0; for (i=0; i<7; i=i+1) begin if (onehot[i]) onehot2bin = i; end endfunction

features.name: onehot detection via bit manipulation feeding FSM-misidentified logic
features.description: Code should include a one-hot detection pattern using bitwise operations that feeds combinational logic updating a registered output, triggering false FSM extraction
features.snippet: assign in_new = in & (~(in-1)); assign covert = onehot2bin(in_new);
